transcript: Customer: This is an emergency, my shower valve has low water pressure and it's getting bad! This is Carlos Mendez at 456 Oak Avenue. Dispatcher: Okay Carlos, stay calm. I'm getting a technician dispatched to 456 Oak Avenue right now. Customer: Please hurry. Dispatcher: A tech is on the way, they'll call you when they're close.

expected_entities.issue: emergency: shower valve has low water pressure
